blocked_by_approval.approval_needed: Explicit scoped approval naming the target host/profile/service and rollback plan.
blocked_by_approval.why_blocked: Production/runtime blast radius; needs current scoped approval, backup, rollback and verification.

blocked_by_approval.approval_needed: Inline decision packet with exact payload, recipient/system, rollback and exclusions.
blocked_by_approval.why_blocked: Could affect customers, money, catalog, campaigns, messages, data stores or suppliers.

blocked_by_approval.approval_needed: Doppler secret-name-level plan; report only presence/status and values_printed=false.
blocked_by_approval.item: Secrets mutation or local secret persistence
blocked_by_approval.why_blocked: Doppler-first policy forbids copying or printing secrets; runtime injection changes require scoped rollout.

blocked_by_approval.approval_needed: Human-approved schedule change packet outside the autonomous cron run.
blocked_by_approval.item: Creating/removing/rescheduling recurring cron jobs from inside the 02h cron
blocked_by_approval.why_blocked: Avoid recursive scheduler drift and hidden automation sprawl.
